description_for_model: Kue Kito is a traditional bakery specializing in authentic pastries and souvenirs from Bengkulu, Indonesia. Key products include Bay Tat (pineapple-filled pastry), Bolu Koja (pandan sponge cake), Kue Siput (snail-shaped peanut cookies), and Lapis Legit. The shop serves as a cultural landmark for Bengkulu heritage food. Customers can view the menu online and order via WhatsApp. Location: Jl. Cimanuk, Bengkulu.
description_for_human: Explore and order authentic traditional Bengkulu pastries like Bay Tat and Bolu Koja from Kue Kito.
